name: sample-repository
description: Sample TypeScript project with simple calculations

scripts.test: node -e "const c = require('./dist/calculator'); console.log('add(2,3)=', c.add(2,3)); console.log('divide(10,2)=', c.divide(10,2)); const v = require('./dist/converter'); console.log('celsiusToFahrenheit(100)=', v.celsiusToFahrenheit(100)); console.log('kmToMiles(10)=', v.kmToMiles(10)); console.log('All tests passed!');"
